exercises.stem: He is tired ___ he keeps working.
exercises.analysis: 「他累了」和「他继续工作」是转折关系，应该用 but。

exercises.stem: Not only she but also I ___ interested in music.
exercises.analysis: not only...but also 连接时遵循就近原则，靠近谓语的是 I，所以用 am。

exercises.stem: ___ my parents ___ my sister has been to the Great Wall.
exercises.analysis: 根据 has（单数），主语是单数或表否定。Neither...nor 表示「两者都不」，连接单数主语时谓语用单数。

exercises.stem: In the sentence "I like cats and dogs", "and" is a coordinating conjunction.
exercises.analysis: and 连接两个对等的名词 cats 和 dogs，是典型的并列连词（coordinating conjunction）。

segments: Hurry up, ___1___ you will miss the bus.
She likes music ___2___ she doesn't play any instrument.
exercises.analysis: 第一句是「否则」的含义，用 or。第二句是转折关系「喜欢但不演奏」，用 but。

exercises.question: 用正确的连词填空并说明理由：___ it rained heavily, we still went hiking.
exercises.referenceAnswer: Although / Though。理由：前后是让步关系「虽然下大雨，但我们还是去了」，需要用让步状语从句的从属连词 although 或 though。
scoringPoints: 正确使用 although 或 though
能解释前后是让步关系
能区分从属连词和并列连词
